name: Lead Magnet Banner
description: A high-conversion email-capture banner with a deep red gradient background. Left column has a yellow badge + headline + body + an inline newsletter signup form (rendered by the forms extension via slug 'newsletter'). Right column is a rotated image of the freebie (a PDF map mockup, a printable, a checklist, etc.).

field_schema.label: Heading
field_schema.help: The primary title of the section — name the freebie clearly.

field_schema.label: Body
field_schema.help: Short pitch — what the reader gets and why it's worth their email.

field_schema.label: Freebie Image
field_schema.help: Rotated photo or mockup of the deliverable (PDF cover, printable, etc.). Yellow background tints behind it on missing photo.

field_schema.label: Image placeholder label
field_schema.help: Monospace overlay caption, only visible when no photo is set.

test_data.heading: The Hanoi Street Food Map.
test_data.body: Every bún chả, bánh mì, and egg coffee spot we actually eat at. Numbered, mapped, ranked, and updated every month.

image.alt: Hand-drawn Vietnam travel journal and map
